name: Windshield — the forward-pointed reconciler (Snapshot → Decide → Apply)
northStar: Freeze the world once into a typed value, decide purely and totally over it, and materialize through proof-carrying single-owner writes — so every decision is a replayable value and every historically dangerous action is uncompilable rather than reviewed-against.
essentialJobShape: Per pass: OBSERVE — decode each session bead once into typed SessionSpec (desired, gc.spec.*) and SessionStatus (observed, gc.status.*), probe the runtime exactly once into tri-state liveness (Alive|Dead|Unknown — errors are never collapsed to false), snapshot config-derived desired world, stamp now+entropy; freeze all of it as one immutable sorted Snapshot. DECIDE — a pure, total, lint-gated function maps the Snapshot to an ordered Plan of closed-sum effects: start, two-phase prime, stamp-identity, heal, adopt, teardown(witness), remove-finalizer(certificate), close(proof), quarantine(TTL), defer. APPLY — one Layer-0 interpreter executes in order through marker-last commits, write-ahead intent pairs, and Rev-CAS whole-value appliers; a failure aborts only that key and requeues with jittered backoff. Fixpoint law: when durable, runtime, and desired agree, the Plan is empty. Boot, crash recovery, and steady state are the same operation. Everything else in the 14,400 LOC is accidental.

corePrimitives.name: Snapshot + ObserveSnapshot
corePrimitives.signature: func ObserveSnapshot(ctx context.Context, d ObserveDeps) (reconcile.Snapshot, error); type Snapshot struct{ Tick TickFacts /*Now,Seq,Entropy*/; Desired DesiredWorld; Cells []Cell /*sorted*/; Health ObsHealth }; type Cell struct{ Key SessionKey; Spec *SessionSpec; Status *SessionStatus; Rev Rev; Runtime RuntimeFacts }
corePrimitives.responsibility: The sole impure read: one total bead decode plus exactly one bounded tri-state runtime probe per key, frozen before any decision. Witnesses are minted here and only here.
corePrimitives.replaces: infoByID hand-fold protocol, the 4 runtime-fact struct types, narrow re-probing accessors (workerSessionTargetRunning/Alive/Attached), the 28-param positional threading and 5-overload wrapper chain (session_reconciler.go:1089-1259).
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3 spine; Cell carries T4's spec/status split so the snapshot cannot ossify into a flat god-struct.

corePrimitives.name: Decide (pure total core with sealed per-state handlers)
corePrimitives.signature: package internal/reconcile — determinism-linted (no time.Now, no rand, no io, no goroutines); func Decide(s Snapshot) Plan; type sessionStep interface{ OnAbsent(Cell) Next; OnCreating(Cell) Next; OnActive(Cell) Next; OnDraining(Cell) Next; OnQuarantined(Cell) Next; OnUnrecognized(Unrecognized, Cell) Next }
corePrimitives.responsibility: Whole-fleet pure decision surface, including cross-session concerns (pool min-floor, wake fairness) as plain code over Cells. Compile-forced totality: one interface method per lifecycle state.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 2,188-line Phase-1 continue-ladder of reconcileSessionBeadsTracedWithNamedDemand, the adoption-barrier and proc-reap decision engines, sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads, the wake/sleep loop. Grows the already-landed deriveConvergeActions (cmd/gc/session_level_converge.go:214).
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3 spine + T2's sealed one-method-per-state handler graft (both SRE and purist judges: types beat lints for totality).

corePrimitives.name: Plan / Effect closed sum + sealed Outcome
corePrimitives.signature: type Effect interface{ isEffect() } // StartSession{Budgeted}, AttemptPrime{IntentMarker}, ConfirmPrime, StampIdentity, HealStatus, Adopt{SessionSpec}, Teardown{W LiveTargetWitness}, RemoveFinalizer{C DeathCertificate}, Close{P CloseProof}, Quarantine{TTL}, Defer{Until}; type Plan struct{ Steps []Step /*Key, Effect, Reason*/ }; type Outcome interface{ sealedOutcome() } // Done | Pending{After} | Quarantine{Reason,TTL} | Fail{Err}
corePrimitives.responsibility: The entire action vocabulary as a closed, proof-typed sum; retry/quarantine/fail are values in the result, never sentinels on the error channel.
corePrimitives.replaces: The closeSessionBeadIf* family, ControlResult.Action free strings, ErrControlPending/ErrControlGraphMalformed errors.Is dispatch, and the 185-code Site/Reason/Outcome trace taxonomy as decision vocabulary.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3's Effect sum + T1's sealed Outcome (SRE judge graft).

corePrimitives.name: Applier + SSA-lite single-owner appliers
corePrimitives.signature: func (a *Applier) Apply(ctx context.Context, s Snapshot, p Plan) ApplyReport; func (st *Store) ApplySpec(ctx, id BeadID, spec SessionSpec) (Rev, error) /*sole writer gc.spec.*; diffs before writing*/; func (st *Store) ApplyStatus(ctx, id BeadID, s SessionStatus, expect Rev) (Rev, error) /*sole writer gc.status.*; Rev-CAS*/
corePrimitives.responsibility: The only side-effecting write site (Layer 0). Every metadata key belongs to exactly one field group with exactly one whole-value applier; partial stamping has no API to live in.
corePrimitives.replaces: ~250 raw SetMetadata call sites, the 21 *Patch constructors as primary write path, per-arrival-path stamping in adoption_barrier.go / session_lifecycle_parallel.go / build_desired_state.go, triplicated attach pipelines, 3 scope-close copies.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3's thin Applier + T4's field-ownership graft — all three judges: the bug corpus is write-side, and ownership protects code not yet rewritten.

corePrimitives.name: Mechanics kit (Commit, IntentMarker, CAS, MintKey)
corePrimitives.signature: package internal/reconcile — func Commit(st Store, id BeadID, writes []KV, preMarker, marker KV) error /*marker-last by construction*/; type IntentMarker struct{ AttemptedAt, ConfirmedAt time.Time; Attempts int }; func (m IntentMarker) Eligible(now time.Time, b Backoff) bool; func CASApply(st Store, id BeadID, expect Rev, writes []KV) (Rev, error); func MintKey(parts ...string) IdempotencyKey
corePrimitives.responsibility: Shared MECHANICAL crash-safety helpers with two-plus real users each (session, convergence, dispatch). Explicitly NOT a generic Engine: state machines stay per-domain per S35.
corePrimitives.replaces: convergence handler.commit (handler.go:789) generalized; the bare SetMetadata marker ordering in reconcile.go:496-511 (verified, including a swallowed-error marker write); molecule.Attach's private epoch fence; per-site priming choreography in prompt_delivery.go.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T1/T4's mechanics WITHOUT T1's mandatory generic — the S35-correct boundary all three judges converged on.

corePrimitives.name: Witness types: DeathCertificate + LiveTargetWitness
corePrimitives.signature: type DeathCertificate struct{ key SessionKey; tick uint64; _ noCopy } // unexported ctor; minted ONLY by ObserveSnapshot when Probe==Observed && Live==Dead; single-use, valid one tick. type LiveTargetWitness — minted only on Probe==Observed && IdentityMatch==True
corePrimitives.responsibility: Proof-carrying destruction: destructive effects are struct-unconstructible without a positively-confirmed observation from THIS pass.
corePrimitives.replaces: The providerAlive bool err→false collapse (session_reconciler.go:1538-1540) that authorizes orphan-closes of live sessions; storeQueryPartial/deferSessionClosesOnBoot boolean guards.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: Unanimous across T1-T4 and all three judges; T3/T4 concrete forms. Non-negotiable.

corePrimitives.name: Finalizer protocol + proof-gated Close
corePrimitives.signature: const FinalizerRuntimeTeardown Finalizer = "runtime-teardown" // stamped unconditionally by ApplySpec at creation; func (st *Store) Close(ctx, id BeadID, p CloseProof) error // the ONLY close API; CloseProof mintable solely from a decoded Status with an empty finalizer set; the teardown finalizer removable only with a DeathCertificate
corePrimitives.responsibility: Guaranteed teardown-before-close; deletion is durable intent (Deleted:true in spec), never an event. Inverts the default from close-on-guess to prove-dead-before-close.
corePrimitives.replaces: The orphan/!desired close arm, pending-create rollback teardown paths, scattered pane-leak guards.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T4 graft — endorsed by all three judges as the decisive protection for legacy paths during migration.

corePrimitives.name: Quarantine Guard
corePrimitives.signature: func (g *Guard) Admit(k SessionKey, now time.Time) Decision // Proceed | Backoff{Until} | Quarantine{TTL, EscalationEvent}; verdicts persist as gc.status.quarantined_until; intensity counters stay in-memory
corePrimitives.responsibility: Per-key restart intensity and poison-key containment with TTL + escalation event; stops the bleeding, escalates treatment to prompts/humans.
corePrimitives.replaces: crashTracker, idleTracker, wispGC/maxSessionAge/orderDispatcher backoff maps, the session circuit-breaker singleton, and the unknown-state skip-forever branch.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T1's Quarantine + T2's intensity semantics; durability split is T4's (flagged as open question #2).

corePrimitives.name: simworld + Invariant suite (the proof system)
corePrimitives.signature: func simworld.Run(seed uint64, sc Scenario) (History, error) // memstore + runtime fake + sim clock; Injector consulted before EVERY effect: CrashHere|StoreErr|ProviderFlap|PartialObserve; var Suite = []Invariant{ NoLiveSessionBeadClosed, NoDestructiveOnUnknown, MarkerLast, AtMostOneDuplicatePrimePerCrash, ConvergesWithinKTicks, AllStartedWorkTerminal, DecideFixpointEmpty }
corePrimitives.responsibility: Deterministic whole-fleet simulation as the correctness proof: crash-between-adjacent-effects is an enumerated test point for every plan the system can emit; failures replay from seed+SHA.
corePrimitives.replaces: The trace WAL's load-bearing debugger role, integration-only crash-recovery coverage, side-effect-archaeology tests across the ~56K-LOC test surface.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3 (T2/T4 concur); SRE judge: 'DST-as-proof is the thesis'.

corePrimitives.name: Flight recorder
corePrimitives.signature: func RecordTick(w io.Writer, s Snapshot, p Plan, r ApplyReport) error // size-capped JSONL; `gc trace` becomes a projection over it
corePrimitives.responsibility: Production telemetry that doubles as a replay corpus: every incident becomes a permanent regression fixture. Same glass as the old WAL, pointed forwards.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 5,124-LOC bespoke WAL store: 16MB segments, CRC32 batches, corrupt-segment quarantine, head-file recovery, pruning, per-template arms.
corePrimitives.sourceThesis: T3's central insight, code-confirmed: the WAL already proved decision inputs are finitely enumerable — record them BEFORE the decision instead of after.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: DeathCertificate / LiveTargetWitness
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Swallowed probe error authorizes destructive close/teardown of a live session (tmux blip → providerAlive=false → orphan-close: gc-hz0nu, gc-kkgak, #2987, #2073)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Close/RemoveFinalizer/Teardown effects have required witness fields with unexported constructors invoked only by ObserveSnapshot on a positively-confirmed probe (Observed+Dead, or Observed+IdentityMatch). An errored or Unknown probe mints nothing — the destructive effect value cannot be built; any bypass is a compile error.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: CloseProof + FinalizerRuntimeTeardown
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Bead closed while its runtime pane lives — the rollback pane-leak and its orphan-close dual (#2073 class)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The store exposes no unconditional close. CloseProof is mintable only from a decoded status whose finalizer set is empty, and the teardown finalizer — stamped unconditionally by the single ApplySpec writer at creation, so it cannot be forgotten — is removable only with a DeathCertificate.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: IntentMarker two-phase pair (attempted → confirmed)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: At-most-once side-effect loss / unbounded at-least-once redelivery across crashes — the S19 priming trap generalized to start, close, rollback, drift-relaunch (#3872, #3279)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The Applier's only effectful entry points take an IntentMarker; the interpreter itself stamps attempted BEFORE the I/O and confirmed after — no call site can reorder the pair. A crash in the window leaves attempted-unconfirmed, which Eligible() converts to bounded backoff retry.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Sealed per-state handler + typed StateUnrecognized{raw, firstSeen}
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Unknown-state skip-forever with no TTL or escalation, re-logged every tick (#2085, #2389, #1496, #1497)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Decoding is total: unknown strings become a first-class typed state. The step interface has one method per state, so adding a state without a handler fails compilation everywhere; OnUnrecognized is compiler-forced to exist and emits Quarantine{TTL}+event. There is no default-continue arm left to write.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Single-owner whole-value appliers (SSA-lite) + enqueue-only arrivals
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Edge-triggered per-arrival-path metadata stamping — each of spawn/adopt/resume/drift/rollback shipping its own subset of identity/priming keys (#3872, #3849, #1893) — and dual-representation hand-coherence drift (#1029, #1938, #3892, ga-ebb62d)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: No per-key write API exists: ApplySpec/ApplyStatus take the full struct and are each the sole writer of their prefix; the beads front door rejects raw SetMetadata on gc.spec./gc.status.; arrival paths can only enqueue a key, so 'path X forgot key Y' has no code path to live in. The raw metadata map is confined to the codec package — a stringly predicate twin cannot be written.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Snapshot-only Decide signature + determinism lint
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: TOCTOU disagreement between per-question re-probes within one pass, and hidden nondeterminism (time.Now, rand, map iteration) silently breaking replay
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Decide's signature admits no store, provider, clock, or context — there is no API through which a decision can re-probe; all arms read the same frozen RuntimeFacts. A vet-style CI gate forbids internal/reconcile from importing io/net/math-rand or calling time.Now; Cells is a sorted slice, never a map.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Sealed Outcome sum
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Retry-later and quarantine-me multiplexed onto the error channel, confusable with real failures (ErrControlPending / ErrControlGraphMalformed sentinel class)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Outcome is a closed sealed-interface set returned in the result value; sentinels are deleted, exhaustiveness is linted, and errors.Is dispatch has nothing left to dispatch on.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Rev-CAS ApplyStatus
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Stale in-memory snapshot folded back over fresher durable state — the hand-coherence clobber class (ga-ebb62d, #1029)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: There is no snapshot-patch API to misuse; every status write carries the Rev observed this pass and a mismatch fails to a requeue, so clobbering a newer write is structurally impossible. (Contingent on open question #1; degrades to idempotent convergence, never to silent clobber.)

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Marker-last Commit
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Dedup/progress marker written before its guarded writes, creating crash windows that drop or replay work (S35 gap #1; the verified reconcile.go:496-511 drift inside the 'sound blueprint' itself)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The API cannot express marker-first: Commit takes the marker as a dedicated trailing parameter and writes it last internally; a vet gate bans bare SetMetadata on reconcile write paths, so the ordering is structural at every call site.

stateModel: The bead is the process heap. Metadata splits into three field groups, each with exactly one writer: gc.spec.* — desired facts (name, alias, rig, pool slot, config hash, wake mode, prompt ref, deleted, finalizers), written only by ApplySpec from config-derived desired state; gc.status.* — observed facts (lifecycle state, hashes, instance token, generation, intent markers, drain/circuit/quarantined_until), written only by the reconciler's ApplyStatus under Rev-CAS; gc.ext.* — operator annotations, never read by Decide. Decoding is total: unknown state strings become typed StateUnrecognized{raw, firstSeen}. The raw metadata map is confined to the codec package; Decide sees only typed Spec/Status — the 50-field Info mirror and its 75 sibling predicates die. In-memory state is loss-tolerant timing scratch only (backoff counters, fairness ages); quarantine verdicts persist in status so crash-loopers keep their penalty across controller restarts (deliberate, flagged break from OTP). Boot state is whatever the ledger says — nothing else exists.
controlLoopShape: Level-triggered, crash-only, single-writer. One serial reconcile pass = ObserveSnapshot (the only impure read) → Decide (pure) → Apply (the only impure write) → RecordTick. The 30s ticker is a resync floor that enqueues all keys; bead events, fsnotify, and pokes are hints that enqueue keys early — arrivals can ONLY enqueue, never write. Per-key jittered exponential backoff plus a global start token bucket make coordinated respawn herds inexpressible in the scheduler; key dedup bounds the queue at fleet size. Deliberately NO worker pool initially: the serial pass preserves whole-snapshot soundness and single-writer-per-bead for free; per-key parallelism is a later optional scheduling change (open question #4). A panic abandons only the pass; the Quarantine Guard notes intensity and quarantines poison keys with TTL + escalation event. Boot is the first tick — the 6-phase startup ladder and the separate recovery path are deleted, because there is no separate recovery path to have bugs in.
testabilityArchitecture: Seven layers, each cheaper and more exhaustive than the last. (1) Table tests: Decide is pure, total, clock-free — every (spec × status × tri-state runtime × desired) row is a plain struct in, effects out; each of the 100+ historical bugs becomes a permanent row; the landed S19 tables widen in place. (2) Laws as property tests: totality fuzz (never panic, never silent-skip); fixpoint idempotence (Apply then re-Observe yields the empty Plan); no-destruction-on-Unknown (vacuous by witness types, fuzzed anyway as a tripwire); plan absoluteness (shuffle+duplicate a plan → same converged world). (3) Determinism gates: the lint that makes replay structural. (4) simworld DST: seeded histories over memstore + fake provider + sim clock at high time compression; the injector fires before every effect, so crash-between-adjacent-effects is enumerated per plan; safety invariants checked every step, liveness after quiescence; quick seeds per PR, continuous nightly soak; failures replay from seed+SHA on a laptop. (5) Differential oracle: the legacy god function's trace stream vs Decide on identical simulated worlds, soaked to zero divergence BEFORE any behavior flip. (6) Production flight-recorder ticks replay offline — every incident becomes a regression fixture. (7) A fake-provider conformance suite runs against real tmux to prevent fidelity drift.
whatGetsDeleted: The 2,188-line/28-param god function and its 5-overload chain; session_reconciler.go, build_desired_state.go, and session_lifecycle_parallel.go shrink to Observe/Apply glue. The 75 raw/Info predicate twins, 3 equivalence-oracle suites, 72-arm ApplyPatch, 21 *Patch constructors, knownSessionStates allowlist. sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads plus the adoption-barrier and proc-reap engines as separate mutators. The 6-phase startup ladder, reloadActiveTTL band-aid, 5 tracker singletons, ErrControlPending sentinels and Action strings. The 5,124-LOC trace WAL (segments/CRC/quarantine/arms/head-recovery) — replaced by a ~300-LOC flight recorder, with gc trace surviving as a projection. Net roughly 15K LOC deleted, ~4-5K added.

migrationPlan.goal: Route convergence's startup Reconciler (reconcile.go:496-511) through handler.commit; build mechanics kit, determinism lint, clock injection into CityRuntime, simworld skeleton.
migrationPlan.safety: No behavior change; existing convergence tests and idempotency keys pin; the kit ships with a real user on day one.

migrationPlan.goal: Land SessionSpec/SessionStatus codecs over EXISTING key names (no renames); route the 21 *Patch constructors through ApplySpec/ApplyStatus.
migrationPlan.safety: Existing equivalence oracles pin byte-identical writes; appliers diff-before-write so Dolt churn is unchanged.

migrationPlan.goal: Land ObserveSnapshot; run the LEGACY god function under simworld via a plan-extraction shim (its trace stream is its plan); establish the differential oracle.
migrationPlan.safety: Legacy code untouched; the harness is proven against current behavior before anything moves.

migrationPlan.goal: Widen the landed deriveConvergeActions into Decide (rollback, identity, priming, heal, drain, close, wake/pool), shadow-diffed then flipped per-arm.
migrationPlan.safety: Each arm soaks to zero divergence in sim AND production shadow behind the S19 parity pin; legacy arm deleted on flip.

migrationPlan.goal: Applier absorbs write paths behind Commit + IntentMarker; stamp finalizers on every spec apply, one-time backfill, enforce proof-gated Close.
migrationPlan.safety: Witness/proof types protect legacy paths too; finalizer backfill is idempotent metadata addition, no semantics change until enforcement flips.

migrationPlan.goal: Tick becomes enqueue-all + serial drain; add per-key jittered backoff and the global start token bucket. No worker pool.
migrationPlan.safety: Scheduling-only change; DST asserts identical converged worlds under permuted schedules and injected crashes.

migrationPlan.goal: Remove legacy arms, Info mirrors, equivalence oracles, and the trace WAL; retarget gc trace to the flight recorder.
migrationPlan.safety: Only code proven unreachable by the flips is removed; production shadow logs confirm no remaining readers first.

migrationPlan.goal: Convergence and dispatch adopt Commit/IntentMarker/CAS/sealed Outcome; dispatch's sentinel errors deleted behind an errors.Is-compat shim.
migrationPlan.safety: State machines stay per-domain (S35); each domain's existing suite is its own pin; mechanics swap is mechanical.

invariantLedger.invariant: ZERO hardcoded roles — no role name in Go
invariantLedger.howHonored: Snapshot, Decide, Plan, and all effects are role-blind lifecycle mechanics; DesiredWorld is derived purely from config; no role string appears in any type, effect, or table row.

invariantLedger.invariant: Keep judgment out of Go — Go is transport/convergence, not reasoning
invariantLedger.howHonored: Decide's total, table-tested branches are the single auditable surface: every branch must cite the durable-vs-observed disagreement it repairs. Quarantine stops bleeding but escalates treatment via event+bead to prompts/humans.

invariantLedger.invariant: Beads are the universal persistence substrate
invariantLedger.howHonored: Spec, status, intent markers, finalizers, and quarantine verdicts all live in bead metadata; nothing durable exists outside the ledger; the bead IS the process heap.

invariantLedger.invariant: Events are the universal outbound-notification mechanism
invariantLedger.howHonored: The Applier fires typed, registered events (quarantine, adopt, close, converge); the flight recorder is telemetry and replay corpus, never a signaling channel.

invariantLedger.invariant: Config is the universal activation mechanism
invariantLedger.howHonored: DesiredWorld is a pure projection of city/pack TOML; all thresholds (backoff, TTLs, budgets) come from Config so no constant encodes policy.
ObserveSnapshot and Applier are the only impure sites; the determinism lint makes I/O in the Decide package uncompilable.

invariantLedger.invariant: No upward layer deps; CLI and API are projections
invariantLedger.howHonored: The pipeline lives in internal/ importing only beads/session/runtime/clock; cmd/gc thins to wiring; gc trace becomes a projection over the recorder.
Every effect executes with zero [[agent]] entries configured; removing any agent removes cells from the snapshot, never a mechanism.

invariantLedger.invariant: The system converges because work persists; redundancy is the reliability mechanism
invariantLedger.howHonored: Level-triggered resync re-derives everything from durable state; the fixpoint law makes repeated independent observation idempotent; boot = first tick, so recovery is convergence.

invariantLedger.invariant: No status/PID/lock files — query live state
invariantLedger.howHonored: Liveness comes only from live probes of the process table/tmux; the flight recorder is append-only telemetry never consulted for process state.

invariantLedger.invariant: No premature abstraction / S35: share idioms, not domains
invariantLedger.howHonored: T1's generic Engine is explicitly rejected; the shared kit contains only helpers with two-plus real implementations (Commit, IntentMarker, CAS); state machines stay per-domain.

invariantLedger.invariant: Typed wire, typed events, atomic writes, no panics, errors with context
invariantLedger.howHonored: Closed sums on every decision surface; writes route through the beads front door's atomic paths; Decide returns Quarantine values instead of panicking; ApplyReport wraps errors with key context.

openQuestions: Rev-CAS feasibility: does the Dolt/sqlite dual store expose a reliable per-bead revision for ApplyStatus CAS? If not, do we accept per-process serial exclusivity + idempotent convergence for cross-process writers, and how loudly should foreign writes to gc.status.* be surfaced?

Quarantine durability: durable quarantined_until (a crash-looping key keeps its penalty across controller restarts — T4) vs in-memory intensity matching the declared OTP precedent (T2). I recommend durable verdict + ephemeral counters, but this reverses a documented design stance and needs your call.

S-series governance: does Windshield formally supersede S19 stages 2-7 (same seams, finished shape), or do we keep shipping under S19's numbering with this as the destination document? Affects how the landed parity pin and deriveConvergeActions are versioned.

Whole-fleet Decide vs per-key Decide: I chose whole-snapshot (preserves single-writer soundness and makes pool min-floor/wake fairness plain code), which means O(fleet) decode+decide per pass. Is that acceptable at your target fleet sizes, and at what size would a per-key worker pool with exclusivity tokens be worth its new concurrency surface?

gc trace compatibility: keep a mapping layer from the new {Snapshot, Plan, ApplyReport} records to the existing 185-code taxonomy for operator continuity (and for engdocs/contributors/reconciler-debugging.md), or break the CLI vocabulary once and retrain?

Parity-pin strictness in Phase 3: byte-identical action streams vs semantically-equivalent classes — legacy nondeterminism (map order, timing) may make literal zero-divergence unreachable; who defines the equivalence relation the pin enforces?

External bd writes during and after migration: should the beads front door hard-reject raw writes to gc.spec./gc.status. prefixes, or accept them and have the reconciler heal loudly as drift? Hard-reject is safer but changes bd's contract for operators.
CI budget: nightly DST soak and the tmux conformance suite both cost real CPU/wall-clock — what budget and what flake-quarantine policy do you want for them?
Snapshot field-budget governance: sub-structs per concern with a hard field budget prevent the 87-field god-struct relapse — who owns/reviews that budget (CODEOWNERS on the codec package)?
Flight recorder retention: size cap, rotation, and whether production ticks (which contain session names/aliases) can be shipped off-box as regression fixtures or must be scrubbed first.
